name: a-return-to-love
description: Marianne Williamson's A Return to Love — a spiritual psychology toolkit based on A Course in Miracles, teaching the choice between love and fear, the practice of forgiveness, releasing the ego, and living from miraculous perception.
useCase: Understand the Course in Miracles framework — learn to shift from fear to love, forgive grievances, and live from a place of inner peace.
knownRisks: The book is based on metaphysical assumptions (non-duality, the unreality of the world) that not all readers will accept
Some Christian readers may object to the Course's reinterpretation of Christian terminology
The framework can feel dismissive of real-world problems and legitimate emotions if taken to an extreme
